sqlMap.select: select count(distinct memberid) from ( select groupid, memberid, membername, membername2, tenant_id from tbl_schedulegroupmember where tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# )A join ( SELECT D.CN, D.DISPLAYNAME, D.COMPANY, D.title, D.MAIL, D.DESCRIPTION , D.DESCRIPTION2, D.department FROM TBL_USERMASTER D WHERE D.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND D.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #v_COMPANYID# UNION ALL SELECT B.cn, B.DISPLAYNAME, C.COMPNM2 as COMPANY, A.title, b.mail, C.DISPLAYNAME AS DESCRIPTION, C.DISPLAYNAME2 AS DESCRIPTION2, A.deptid FROM TBL_USERMASTER B INNER JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER A ON A.CN = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID RIGHT JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER C ON A.DEPTID = C.CN AND B.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND C.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #v_COMPANYID#) BB ON A.memberid = BB.cn WHERE A.groupid = #v_GROUPID# AND A.tenant_id = #v_TENANTID#

select a.groupid as groupid, b.groupname as groupname, b.description as description, b.createdate as createdate, b.creatorid as memberid from tbl_schedulegroupmember a, tbl_schedulegroup b where a.groupid = b.groupid
AND b.groupname LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_SEARCHVALUE#, '%')
DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(b.createdate,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d') >= #v_STARTDATE#
DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(b.createdate,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d') <= #v_ENDDATE#
AND a.membername = #v_SEARCHVALUE#
AND b.creatorname = #v_SEARCHVALUE#
and b.tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# and b.companyid = #v_COMPANYID#
GROUP BY b.groupid, b.groupname, b.description, b.createdate, b.creatorid ORDER BY b.groupname

select DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(b.modifydate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S'),INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) as modifydate, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(b.createdate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S'),INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) as createdate, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(b.transferdate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S'),INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) as transferdate, b.creatorid as creatorid, b.precreatorid as precreatorid, a.groupid as groupid, b.groupname as groupname, b.description as description, b.creatorname as creatorname, b.precreatorname as precreatorname, b.creatorname2 as creatorname2, b.precreatorname2 as precreatorname2, b.groupcolor as groupcolor from tbl_schedulegroupmember a, tbl_schedulegroup b where a.groupid = b.groupid
AND b.groupname LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_SEARCHVALUE#, '%')
DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(b.createdate,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d') >= #v_STARTDATE#
DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(b.createdate,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d') <= #v_ENDDATE#
AND CASE #v_PRIMARYDATA# WHEN '1' THEN a.membername WHEN '2' THEN a.membername2 END LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_SEARCHVALUE#, '%')
AND CASE #v_PRIMARYDATA# WHEN '1' THEN b.creatorname WHEN '2' THEN b.creatorname2 END LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_SEARCHVALUE#, '%')
and b.tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# and b.companyid = #v_COMPANYID#
GROUP BY b.groupid, b.modifydate, b.createdate, b.transferdate, b.creatorid, b.precreatorid, b.groupname, b.description, b.creatorname, b.precreatorname, b.creatorname2, b.precreatorname2, b.groupcolor order by b.createdate desc
LIMIT #v_STARTROW#, #v_MAXITEMPERPAGE#

select a.idx as idx, case #v_LANGDATA# when '1' then username when '2' then username2 else username2 end username, case #v_LANGDATA# when '1' then b.description when '2' then b.description2 else b.description2 end description, case #v_LANGDATA# when '1' then departmentname when '2' then departmentname2 else departmentname2 end deptname from tbl_schedule_public_dept a inner join tbl_usermaster b on a.usercn = b.cn and a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id where a.tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# and a.companyID = #v_COMPANYID# order by a.idx
select count(*) from tbl_schedule_public_dept where tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# and usercn = #v_USERID# and departmentcn = #v_DEPTID# and companyid = #v_COMPANYID#
sqlMap.update: update tbl_holidaylist set isuse = #v_ISUSE# where holidayid = #v_HOLIDAYID# and tenant_id = #v_TENANTID#

update tbl_holidaylist set holidayname = #v_HOLIDAYNAME#, holidayname2 = #v_HOLIDAYNAME2#, holidayflag = #v_HOLIDAYFLAG#, holidaydate = #v_HOLIDAYDATE#, holidayrepeat = #v_HOLIDAYREPEAT#, issolar = #v_ISSOLAR#, isrepeat = #v_ISREPEAT#, isrest = #v_ISREST#, usecompany = #v_COMPANYID# where holidayid = #v_HOLIDAYID# and tenant_id = #v_TENANTID#
update tbl_lunaruse set lunaruse = #v_LUNARUSE# where usecompany = #v_COMPANYID# and tenant_id = #v_TENANTID#
update tbl_previoslyregi set previoslyregiuse = #v_REGI# where usecompany = #v_COMPANYID# and tenant_id = #v_TENANTID#
sqlMap.delete: delete from tbl_schedule_public_dept where idx = #v_ID# and tenant_id = #v_TENANTID#
delete from tbl_holidaylist where holidayid = #v_HOLIDAYID# and tenant_id = #v_TENANTID#
sqlMap.select:
select distinct a.PRIORITY, a.cn, case #v_LANG# when '1' then b.DISPLAYNAME when '2' then b.DISPLAYNAME2 else b.DISPLAYNAME2 end DISPLAYNAME, case #v_LANG# when '1' then b.DESCRIPTION when '2' then b.DESCRIPTION2 else b.DESCRIPTION2 end DESCRIPTION, a.USAGE, a.CREATEUSER, case #v_LANG# when '1' then c.DISPLAYNAME when '2' then c.DISPLAYNAME2 else c.DISPLAYNAME2 end CREATEUSERNAME, a.LASTUPDATE from tbl_executive a inner join tbl_usermaster b on a.cn = b.cn and a.COMPANYID = b.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME and a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id inner join tbl_usermaster c on a.CREATEUSER = c.CN and a.COMPANYID = c.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME and a.tenant_id = c.tenant_id where a.COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# and a.tenant_id = #v_TENANTID#
and a.cn = #cn#
and b.DISPLAYNAME like CONCAT('%', #v_KEYWORD#, '%')
sqlMap.insert: insert into tbl_executive (CN, PRIORITY, `USAGE`, CREATEUSER, LASTUPDATE, COMPANYID, TENANT_ID) values (#v_USERID#, #v_PRIORITY#, #v_USAGE#, #v_CREATEUSER#, #v_SYSDATE#, #v_COMPANYID#, #v_TENANTID#)
sqlMap.update:
update tbl_executive set PRIORITY = #v_PRIORITY#
`USAGE` = #v_USAGE#, CREATEUSER = #v_CREATEUSER#, LASTUPDATE = #v_SYSDATE#
where CN = #v_USERID# and COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# and TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
sqlMap.delete: delete from tbl_executive where CN = #v_USERID# AND COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# and TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
